name: Get GL Lines by Account and Company

content.query:
SELECT 
org.CompanyID
,sum(gl.DebitAmount - gl.CreditAmount)
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION] gl
,[EDW].[DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT] acc
,[EDW].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH] brn
,[EDW].[DIM_ERP_ORGANIZATION] org
where 
gl.AccountCode = acc.AccountCode
and gl.BranchCode = brn.BranchCode
and brn.CompanyID = org.CompanyID
and acc.AccountCode in 
('71000','71002','71004','71008','71009','71010','71011','71012','71013','71014','71015','71016','71017','71018','71020')
and org.CompanyID in ('0001','0003')
and gl.PeriodID = '072022'
group BY
org.CompanyID
